calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James M. Millar, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tanya Herrgott, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Anna Hadley.
Default was entered against defendant on June 4, 2010.
Clerk's Judgment pursuant to CCP Section 1169 was entered against defendant on June 4, 2010.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 720 York Street, Apt. 217, San Francisco, CA 94110 was obtained on June 23, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Tanya Herrgott, and against the Defaulted Defendant Anna Hadley as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $6,750.00.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $580.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $7,330.00.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Denied

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Text Ruling

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ANNA HADLEY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce D. Long, CSR # 8620 =301/PJB
